debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v_1 v p ih : V
h : G.Adj v p
p_1 : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G p ih
h_support :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G v ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G v p ih h p_1) =
    insert v (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1)
h_edge :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G v ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G v p ih h p_1) =
    insert s(v, p) (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1)
h_ind :
  Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1) + 1
hv : v ∉ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1
h_card_union :
  ({s(v, p)} ∪ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1).card =
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1) + 1
⊢ Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1) ≤
    (insert s(v, p) (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1)).card

failed_attempts:
calc
          Finset.card p_1.supportSet ≤ Finset.card p_1.edgeSet + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ Finset.card (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet) := by rw [← h_card_union]; simp [Finset.insert_eq]

calc
          Finset.card p_1.supportSet ≤ Finset.card p_1.edgeSet + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ Finset.card (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet) := by
            rw [h_card_union]
            simp [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
            intro H
            have : s(v, p) ∈ p_1.edgeSet := H
            have : ∃ d ∈ p_1.darts, Sym2.mk d = s(v, p) := by
              simp_all [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, List.mem_toFinset]
            obtain ⟨d, hd₁, hd₂⟩ := this
            have : d = (v, p) ∨ d = (p, v) := by
              simp_all [Sym2.eq_iff]
            cases this <;> simp_all [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support]
            <;> exact False.elim (hv (List.mem_toFinset.mpr (by aesop)))
